expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width], [Height],[Depth] 是总测量，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ialah jumlah ukuran, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] เป็นการวัดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุกระดานด้านบน ด้านล่างและด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa isang kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal sa itaas, ibaba, at gilid na mga board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: နေကူရမတာဗဥ့်
